Same outward behavior as s10: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in, agent reply out.
The new externally-visible signal is the per-tick state-transition log
(printed in -v mode). Slash commands (/help, /clear) short-circuit
straight to RESPOND with no LLM call.

$ go run . -workspace /tmp/agent-demo -v "Tokyo weather"
[s11] bootstrap files present: 0/4 ([AGENTS.md SOUL.md USER.md TOOLS.md])
[s11] loaded 2 skill(s) from workspace="/tmp/agent-demo/skills" builtin=".../testdata/skills"
       - echo
       - weather
[s11] skills requested for system prompt: []
[s11] autocompact TTL: 5m0s; compact budget: 0
[s11] state: START -> RESTORE
[s11] state: RESTORE -> COMPACT
[s11] state: COMPACT -> COMMAND
[s11] state: COMMAND -> BUILD
[s11] state: BUILD -> RUN
[iter 0] -> bash {command:curl -s wttr.in/Tokyo?format=3}
[iter 0] <- Tokyo: ☀ +18°C
[iter 0] assistant: ...
[s11] state: RUN -> SAVE
[s11] state: SAVE -> RESPOND
[s11] state: RESPOND -> DONE
[s11] hook recorded 1 tool invocation(s): [bash]
[s11] terminal state: DONE
Tokyo: clear, 18°C.

The slash-command short-circuit (no LLM call):

$ go run . -v /help
[s11] state: START -> RESTORE
[s11] state: RESTORE -> COMPACT
[s11] state: COMPACT -> COMMAND
[s11] state: COMMAND -> RESPOND
[s11] state: RESPOND -> DONE
[s11] terminal state: DONE
Available commands:
  /help    Show this help text.
  /clear   Reset the current session's message history.

The seven-state walk maps onto seven prior sessions plus two new states:

  RESTORE  s05 (SessionManager) + s06 (MemoryStore)
  COMPACT  s10 (Consolidator)
  COMMAND  new — slash command short-circuit
  BUILD    s06 + s07 (Skills) + s08 (ContextBuilder)
  RUN      s04 (Runner) + s09 (Hook)
  SAVE     s06 (MemoryStore.AppendHistory)
  RESPOND  new — final string assembly

Tests:

$ go test -count=1 -race ./...
ok      learn-nanobot/s11       3.5s

Total: 21 tests in s11. New in this session:

  loop_test.go (8 tests):
    TestLoop_HappyPath_RestoreToDone
    TestLoop_CompactState_TriggersConsolidator
    TestLoop_CommandState_SlashHelp_ShortCircuits
    TestLoop_RunState_ToolUseRoundTrip
    TestLoop_SaveState_PersistsTurn
    TestLoop_ErrorInBuild_TransitionsToError
    TestLoop_ProcessIsIdempotentForSameSessionKey
    TestLoop_NewLoopDefaults

  state_test.go (4 tests):
    TestTransitions_AllStatesReachableFromRestore
    TestTransitions_NoTerminalStatesInTable
    TestTurnState_String
    TestTurnContext_AdvanceAndFail

Plus 9 carry-over tests from s10's consolidator_test.go + autocompact_test.go.
